label: New — your Home dashboard
items: A brand-new main Dashboard: every location and area at a glance — plants with colour-coded growth stages, live soil moisture and temperature, watering valve status, and today's task load per area.

A "Needs attention" row surfaces what actually matters: overdue tasks, weather alerts, failed automations, low sensor batteries, dry beds and closing harvest windows — hidden when your garden is calm.
Simple and Detailed views: friendly wording for newer gardeners, dense telemetry for pros. Rhozly picks a default from your garden quiz; one tap switches.
Quick actions on desktop for the first time — your customised launcher tiles now follow you between the mobile Quick screen and the Dashboard.
Pros in Detailed view get a week pulse: a compact 7-day strip of done / pending / overdue plus harvests due and yield picked.

label: Where did my old dashboard go?
items: Nowhere — it's the new "Overview" tab, one tap away, completely unchanged.
Old links and saved preferences carry over automatically.
